name: Building 7 Collapse
description: The collapse of 7 World Trade Center (WTC 7) on September 11, 2001, has become a significant point of contention and a cornerstone of various conspiracy theories. WTC 7, a 47-story skyscraper, collapsed at 5:20 PM EST, hours after the collapse of the Twin Towers. Official reports, primarily from the National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST), attribute the collapse to uncontrolled fires caused by debris from the collapsing North Tower, which weakened the building's internal steel structure, leading to a progressive collapse. Conspiracy theories, however, dispute this explanation, suggesting that WTC 7 was brought down by controlled demolition. Proponents point to the speed and symmetry of the collapse, comparing it to controlled demolitions, and question the official explanation of fire-induced structural failure. They often cite the lack of molten steel in the NIST report as evidence against fire as the primary cause. Mainstream engineers and scientists, however, maintain that the NIST report adequately explains the collapse, emphasizing the unique nature of the fires, the structural damage sustained, and the thermal expansion of steel. They criticize the controlled demolition theories by highlighting the implausibility of planting explosives in a building without detection, the lack of audible explosions recorded, and the absence of other telltale signs of controlled demolition. The debate surrounding the collapse of WTC 7 continues to fuel broader discussions about the events of 9/11.
subtitle: Debated 9/11 building collapse.

claims.claim: WTC 7 collapsed due to controlled demolition.
claims.evidence: Symmetry and speed of collapse resemble controlled demolitions; freefall speed observed in video footage; alleged insider trading before 9/11.
claims.criticism: NIST report attributes collapse to fire-induced structural failure; freefall claim disputed with analysis of video footage; insider trading claims lack conclusive evidence.

claims.claim: Fires were insufficient to cause a complete structural failure.
claims.evidence: Steel-framed buildings have historically withstood fires for longer durations; fires were not particularly hot; lack of molten steel in the wreckage.
claims.criticism: NIST report details unique fire conditions and structural damage; steel does not need to melt for structural failure to occur; thermal expansion and creep can weaken steel significantly.

claims.claim: Evidence of explosives was suppressed or ignored.
claims.evidence: Accounts of explosions before the collapse; alleged presence of thermite residue; discrepancies in official reports.
claims.criticism: No credible evidence of explosives found; thermite residue claims contested and explained by other materials; official reports have been subject to independent review and scrutiny.

keyFigures.name: Richard Gage
keyFigures.role: Architect and founder of Architects & Engineers for 9/11 Truth, a leading proponent of the controlled demolition theory.

keyFigures.name: Shyam Sunder
keyFigures.role: Lead investigator for the NIST WTC 7 report, defending the official explanation of fire-induced collapse.

mythologyConnections: The Tower of Babel (symbolism of hubris and destruction)

timeline.event: World Trade Center attacks; WTC 7 collapses.
FEMA releases initial report on WTC collapses.
NIST releases final report on WTC 7 collapse.
Continued debate and research by proponents and critics of the official explanation.
